title: PYE Core Values
description: n Our Core Values and Beliefs n Values and beliefs guide actions of people in any Organization. The strong potential for growth and development of our Company rests on our following core Values & Beliefs: n n Honesty is the best policy and for us it more than a policy as it is well ingrained in every person adding value to daily operations of our Company. n We consider Integrity as the key to success and it reflects clearly in our actions. n We make commitments and try our level best to maintain negligible distance between our words and actions. n We do respect the competition as we firmly believe that innovation blossoms in a competitive environment ultimately satisfying unknown need of customers. n We believe in long-term business cooperation and some of our stakeholders have been associated With us since the Company was founded. n We believe that quality of our products and word of mouth advertising are effective advertising tools. n We believe in taking great care of our environment and communities in which we operate and have complete sense of responsibility towards the society. n n
